subject: Swift trigger 1108208 is not an interesting astrophysical event.
body:
A. Y. Lien (U Tampa), K. L. Page (U Leicester),
T. M. Parsotan (GSFC/UMBC/CRESSTII) and A. Tohuvavohu (U Toronto)
report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

Although Swift-BAT triggered on Sco X-1, the source has not brightened
unusually. This trigger is not an indication of an interesting
astrophysical event and can be ignored.
